message: Jake
Fabar
Having come to Guy and Kristy's funeral, I discovered a surprising truth there.
Guy had somehow gotten married to Kristy.
I had no idea about such things. I started to feel pathetic thinking that I was supposed to be his best friend.
But the two of them would be buried together happily, and I thought maybe Kristy was a bit happy about that.
I still couldn't grasp the reality that they were gone.
Hey, you came too.
Director
What brought you here?
Well, is it strange for me to show my face?
No.
I'm sure Guy and Kristy are pleased about this. Thank you.
I’m just bored anyway. Besides, at least I had some involvement.
Look
Talk
Listen
System
Surroundings
Director
Director
About Guy
About Kristy
About the accident
Save
Exit the game
The funeral site, covered in green, was very beautiful and a soothing place.
If it weren't for Guy and Kristy's funeral, it would have been a pleasant spot.
Unlike my usual casual attire, I'm wearing a black suit. It certainly gives me an added gravitas.
I suddenly feel like I've aged; could it be because of the outfit?
But you know, just when I thought Guy had come back, this happened.
Yeah, these past few days have been really unpleasant, haven’t they?
It's a strange story, but it hasn't been long since the party in Boston, and yet misfortune keeps striking those close to me.
That's true.
As the director said, ever since I was brought to the party by Guy, my life has become hectic, and unfortunate events keep occurring.
You should be careful too. You never know when something might happen.
Please be careful too, Director.
Yeah, thanks.
I was feeling really down.
Now that Guy and Kristy are dead, I hated myself for having even the slightest suspicion about them.
Maybe the reason Guy didn't keep in touch with me was that I showed an attitude of suspecting Kristy.
I can't help but wonder if I made an outrageous mistake towards them.
Yuriko.
Boss.
Boss.
Huh?
Oh, it's you, Yuriko.
What's wrong?
Yuriko.
It's not 'what's wrong.' I've been spaced out ever since I went to Guy's funeral.
What happened?
What do you mean what happened?
Nothing in particular.
Yuriko.
The Boss is sensitive, so I'm sure he's regretting suspecting Guy and the others.
Yuriko sometimes hits the nail on the head, which is a bit scary.
It's not anything like that.
Yuriko.
Ducking the issue won't help.
But, you know, being depressed won't solve anything.
That's true, but...
Yuriko.
If you feel guilty about Guy and Kristy, then instead of being down, you should capture the real culprit.
Yuriko's words certainly hit the mark. I can't help but think that just because I take action, something will actually happen.
That being said, doing nothing is nothing but unproductive.
Yuriko
Boss, your complexion has gotten a little better, hasn’t it? Now, do your best at your detective work, okay? Hehe.
Ah.
Ah, Yuriko is really demanding, isn’t she?
Yuriko.
That's right, Ms. Yuriko is a woman who works her subordinates hard. Now, get out to the city quickly.
! Just kidding!
Oh, scary.
I need to head out soon or it’s going to get scary.
I had no idea Guy and Kristy were married, did you know, director?
Actually, I got a call from Guy. He let me know that he decided to marry Kristy.
I see.
It’s strange that I knew a lot while leaving out my best friend.
I feel a bit guilty.
When was the last time you talked to Guy?
I.
I got a call before going on a trip. That was the last time. It was a brief call saying he was heading out in the afternoon.
I see. So that means I was closer to him. I was getting calls almost daily.
Guy was really troubled. It seems he intended to put off the marriage with Kristy until at least the party.
Is that so?
I didn’t know anything.
Was it hard for him to say?
It seems that my last call before the accident was sudden.
At that time, I heard he got married.
Was it that sudden?
Yeah, I wonder what happened.
Life is unpredictable; I never thought it would come to this.
I don’t know her well, but it seems Guy was troubled about various things regarding women.
Yeah. It seemed like they were going around talking to different people.
I wonder if she eventually met Jennifer. Jennifer wasn't there when she came to visit the filming.
It’s just my wild guess, but maybe Guy married Kristy because he felt sorry for her.
Felt sorry for her, you say?
Well, that's a bit rude towards her, but I think Guy came to understand what she had been through.
In the end, since she managed to marry Guy, I guess you could say Kristy got what she wanted.
Guy and Kristy were in an accident, right?
Yeah, apparently they veered off the road and fell off a cliff because they were speeding.
Veered off the steering.
Ah. Even athletes can have a lapse in judgement sometimes.
They were apparently almost in a state of instant death. I guess that's what we should call the silver lining in misfortune.
Was it really an accident, though?
The local police seem to think so.
Do you think there’s a possibility it wasn’t an accident?
No, it's not that.
I get where you're coming from. But it seems like it was definitely an accident.
Death comes suddenly, doesn't it?
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
